P a d a space g r a f i k space d i b a w a h space i n i comma space d a e r a h space y a n g space d i a r s i r space m e r u p a k a n space h i m p u n a n space p e n y e l e s a i a a n space p r o g r a m space l i n i e r. space space space space space space space space space N i l a i space m a k s i m u m space d a r i space f u n g s i space o b j e k t i f space f left parenthesis x comma y right parenthesis space equals space 2 x space plus space 5 y space space p a d a space g r a f i k space d i space a t a s space a d a l a h space horizontal ellipsis. space
